title: evidence_registry per_candidate keys.tsv row
description: Schema for one row of evidence_registry/per_candidate/<candidate_id>/keys.tsv. Each row is a flat scalar key extracted from a Tier-2 structured block (validated against the block's schema in structured_block_schemas/) per the keys_extracted directive. Keys follow the qN_* convention (q1_* through q7_*) mapping to the seven characterization questions.

key.description: Scalar key name. Convention: qN_<scientific_name> where N in 1..7 maps to characterization question.

value.description: Scalar value. Type-coerced to string in the TSV; validators must parse per the originating block schema.

block_type.description: Originating Tier-2 block type. FK into structured_block_schemas/<block_type>.schema.json.

written_by.description: Script that wrote this row (e.g. STEP_C01i_decompose.R).
